reason: Tested agent chat functionality by sending a math question and verifying the agent responded with the correct answer.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the Gamut application with sidebar containing agent list.
Find and click the "QA-20260708-205144-rhnd" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully, URL changed to /agents/qa-20260708-205144-rhnd-laxwmcfyh1.
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle", which meets the requirement.
Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed successfully in the input field and sent by clicking the "Send message" button.
Wait up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded in approximately 1 second. Response processing completed successfully.

Verify the response mentions "4" and take a screenshot — Agent responded with "4", the correct answer to 2+2. Screenshot captured showing the user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4" with status "Worked for 1s".
